title: Partnerships with Stakeholders. The Department shall maintain and
content: 27 strengthen its partnership with LGUs, other government agencies, private sector, non- 28 government organizations, unions, international organizations and civil society 29 organizations advocating the rights and welfare of seafarers, for the purpose of 30 dissemination of information on all aspects of overseas employment, including the 31 conduct of information and education campaigns on anti-illegal recruitment and anti- 32 trafficking in persons, and welfare and reintegration. 33 34
